name: academorix/authorization
purpose: Attribute-driven controller authorization — RequirePermission, RequireAnyPermission, RequireRole, RequireAnyRole, and AllowGuest enforced by a middleware before the controller body runs.
capabilities: Zero DB / migrations — pairs with academorix/access for storage
PermissionContributor + RoleContributor tags for boot-time seeding
Fails 401 / 403 before the controller body runs
when_to_use: Every controller declares its permission / role gates via attributes — enforced before the controller body executes.
when_not_to_use: For Role + Permission Eloquent models, migrations, and admin CRUD, use the heavier academorix/access package.
